subject: Masked Saiyan in dark armor and white mask, dark energy surrounding figure in combative pose
suspected_ip: Bardock / The Masked Saiyan (Dragon Ball Xenoverse / Dragon Ball Heroes)
description: A warrior figure is shown in a dynamic combative mid-shot pose. The figure wears dark Saiyan armor and a white mask covering the face — the masked form is clearly the primary visual register here. The mask has a smooth visor appearance. Dark shadowy energy or black ki radiates from the figure's body, with red or dark flame-like effects visible. The background is dark and turbulent with swirling dark energy. The figure's posture is aggressive and forward-pressing. No unmasked face is visible — the card depicts the masked form, not the unmasked reveal moment.
foreground: Masked warrior in dark Saiyan armor with white mask, surrounded by dark shadowy energy
background: Dark turbulent void with swirling dark energy
